Package neqsim.pvtsimulation.reservoirproperties.relpermeability

package neqsim.pvtsimulation.reservoirproperties.relpermeability
Relative permeability models for reservoir simulation.

This package provides industry-standard relative permeability models including Corey, LET, and normalized table generation for Eclipse-format keywords (SWOF, SGOF, SOF3, SLGOF).

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    neqsim.pvtsimulation.reservoirproperties
     
  • Class
    Description
    RelativePermeabilityGenerator
    Relative permeability table generator supporting Corey and LET models.
    RelPermModelFamily
    Enumeration of relative permeability model families.
    RelPermTableType
    Enumeration of relative permeability table types for reservoir simulation.
